app.title: Small Demo Manager
home.welcome.title: Get Started
home.welcome.text:
Open any CS2 demo file (.dem) to see match stats, extract voice chat, build a spectator command, and more.

Drop your .dem file below or click Load Demo to begin.

Go to Settings → Paths and pick a folder.

about.title: About
about.description:
Small Demo Manager — analyze Counter-Strike 2 demos, extract voice audio, build spectator commands, and review match stats.

Originally built for the CS2 community.
about.author: Original by: pythaeusone
about.version.title: Version
about.support.title: Links
howto.bitfield.title: Spectator Tools
howto.bitfield.text: Open a .dem file, check the players you want to hear, then copy the console command. Paste it in CS2 to listen to only those players while spectating.
howto.match.title: Match Stats
howto.match.text: After loading a demo, switch here to see kills, deaths, assists, headshots, damage, MVPs, and multi-kill rounds for every player.
howto.audio.title: Voice Extraction
howto.audio.text: Click Extract Voice to pull voice chat from the demo. Files are organized by player. Double-click a clip to play it. Right-click to save it.
howto.timeline.title: Match Timeline
howto.timeline.text: Every kill from the match, sorted by round. Filter by round to see who killed who, with what weapon, and whether it was a headshot.
howto.settings.title: Settings
howto.settings.text: Switch between dark and light themes, set your CS2 demo folder, choose where to save voice clips, and add the .dem context menu to Windows.
msg.not_sourcetv: This demo was recorded from a player's POV. Voice extraction requires a SourceTV demo.
msg.pyperclip_missing: Clipboard module not found — install pyperclip
